properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Pray away, pray away There's no problem so great that we can't pray away Pray away, pray away All we need is faith that He can solve it today

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: When temptation is great and faith seems small Reason only confuses trying to hear His call There's only one solution there at your command List them no more as burdens for they're in Someone else's hands

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Pray away, pray away There's no problem so great that we can't pray away

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Sometimes emotion is there, sometimes it's not It's not the feeling that counts it's the faith that we have got He hears us when we pray, in solitude or a crowd He misses not a word, whether whispered in our hearts or spoken out loud

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Pray away, pray away Until we've all gone home, let's just pray away Pray away, pray away Till our last breath is gone, we'll all be praying away

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Pray away, pray away Pray away
